message.content:
(1) PASS - A single white card is centered horizontally and vertically on the page.  
(2) PASS - The ScolaFlow logo (green graduation cap in a rounded square) is at the top of the card, centered, with the ScolaFlow name and subtitle below.  
(3) PASS - Below the logo is the login form (email field, password field, green "Se connecter" button).  
(4) PASS - Below the form are 5 quick-login role buttons.  
(5) PASS - A copyright line sits below the card.  
(6) PASS - No large emerald gradient panel on the left anymore.  

Overall layout: The login page features a single centered white card containing the ScolaFlow logo, login form, quick-login roles, and copyright text, with no left/right split panel.
